items.prompt: A high-speed close-up video of a single water droplet falling into a mirror-like puddle, causing a crown splash followed by circular ripples.
items.clean_source_notes: Droplet/impact point and expanding ripple/crown sequence are visible.

items.prompt: A macro video of a distinct blue ink droplet entering a clear glass of still water from above, causing a blue plume to bloom downward through the transparent water.
items.clean_source_notes: Blue source is partly cropped at the top, but the downward plume progression is clear.

items.prompt: A realistic side close-up video of a bicycle tire entering the frame and rolling through soft wet mud, leaving a sharp tire track behind it.
items.clean_source_notes: Bicycle tire enters/leaves frame and a muddy tire track remains visible.

items.prompt: A fixed front-view video of a small dark rock flying into a clean car windshield, causing a spiderweb crack to spread outward from the impact point.
items.clean_source_notes: Rock appears before a spiderweb crack expands and remains on the windshield.

items.prompt: A realistic close-up video of a black-and-white soccer ball hitting the center of a white goal net, causing the net to stretch backward and ripple.
items.clean_source_notes: Soccer ball and net deformation are clearly visible across frames.

items.prompt: A slow-motion close-up video of a bright yellow tennis ball hitting the center of a tennis racket, causing the racket strings to bend inward.
items.clean_source_notes: Tennis ball contact and racket-string bending are clearly visible.

items.prompt: A close-up video of a yellow plastic comb moving near tiny white paper scraps on a blue table, causing the scraps to lift toward the comb.
items.clean_source_notes: Comb enters above paper scraps and scraps visibly react/cluster; usable field-mediated source.

items.prompt: A fixed close-up video of a small desk fan blowing toward hanging paper streamers, causing the streamers to bend backward and flutter.
items.clean_source_notes: Fan and streamers are visible; streamers bend consistently backward.

items.prompt: A side-view video of a black hair dryer blowing toward colorful ribbons, causing the ribbons to flutter and bend away from the air stream.
items.clean_source_notes: Hair dryer and colorful ribbons are visible with clear fluttering response.
